name: google_sheets_clear_spreadsheet_row_s
description: Clears the contents of the selected row(s) while keeping the row(s) intact in the spreadsheet.

output_hint.description: REQUIRED. Natural language description of what data you want from the results. Example: 'just the title and created date' or 'only items with status active, showing id and name'. A filter will be automatically generated to extract this data.
